chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1780 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 15595/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 15596/16 4. For Katcha Peshi. 01.11.2016. Mr. Raja H. R Naurang, Advocate for petitioner alongwith Petitioner. -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. True translation of the annexure(s) to be filed on or before the next date of hearing. 4. It is, inter alia, contended that petitioner visited Police Station Missan, District Tando Allahyar, for lodging of FIR against private respondents, who, according to him, have committed theft in his house, but official respondent No.4 not only refused to lodge FIR but now private respondents are also extending threats to petitioner. Issue notices to the private respondents through all modes except publication as well as notice to official respondents and A.A.G for a date to be fixed by the office after three weeks. In the meantime, respondents are restrained from causing harassment to the petitioner and official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and if the petitioner approaches the official respondents for protection, the same should be provided to him in accordance with law. JUDGE Ali Haider
